page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.8xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the custom Alibaba Yitian710 processor. Built on the arm64 architecture, this instance features 32 dedicated physical cores running at 2.75 GHz with a single thread per core. It is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The CPU includes 64 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 64 MB of L3 cache, alongside hardware-accelerated AES cryptography. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place this instance in the average to strong performance tiers. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is a notable strength, reaching 272.21 GB/sec, which ranks in the top 25% of tested systems. Passmark memory and database operations also demonstrate strong performance, scoring 2907.18 and 23774.36 respectively. Standard CPU benchmarks, such as the stress-ng multi-core test (57653.7) and the Passmark CPU score (22713.48), fall within the middle 50% tier. For memory-bound tasks, the instance delivers a read-only large block bandwidth of 97.81 GB/sec and a write large block bandwidth of 47.9 GB/sec.

Utilizing custom Arm-based Yitian710 silicon allows the ecs.g8y.8xlarge to offer high resource density and power efficiency compared to traditional x86 architectures. The dedicated core allocation ensures predictable execution without hyperthreading interference. This profile is highly effective for multi-threaded decompression, database operations, static web serving, and moderate language model inference, where its 16 Gbps network baseline and balanced memory-to-CPU ratio can be fully leveraged.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores on the arm64 Alibaba Yitian710 processor running at 2.75 GHz. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, yielding 4.0 GB per core, and operates on a KVM hypervisor with a 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or GPU acceleration. Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression (272.21 GB/sec) and database operations, alongside average multi-core CPU performance. The custom Arm architecture provides qualitative cost efficiency through high resource density and dedicated, non-hyperthreaded execution. This server is suited for database workloads, multi-threaded data processing, static web serving, and light machine learning inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8y.8xlarge is an arm64 general-purpose server with 32 dedicated Yitian710 cores, 128 GB RAM, and a 16 Gbps network baseline, delivering strong database and decompression performance.

tagline: An arm64-based general-purpose instance featuring dedicated physical cores and balanced memory for efficient database and multi-threaded workloads.

Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core
Delivers strong multi-threaded decompression and database benchmark performance
Features 16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage or GPU
Suited for database operations, web serving, and multi-threaded data processing
